items.title: Roundup: Surging gas price ignites supply security debate in Netherlands
items.summary: THE HAGUE, March 11 (Xinhua) -- Amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, natural gas prices in the Netherlands have surged sharply, sparking renewed debate over how to ensure a stable gas supply. As the country has shifted from being a major gas exporter to a highly import-dependent consumer, policymakers, researchers and energy companies are increasingly discussing measures such as strategic gas reserves to safeguard supply security. items.title: Shape up boundaries in/around your yard with this 60V Greenworks cordless electric edger while down at $210 (Reg. $300)
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Greenworks 60V 8-inch Brushless Cordless Electric Edger with 2.0Ah battery at $209.98 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. It’s dropping down from its $300 full price, which marks the best deal we’ve seen since October. The price here is only beaten out by falls to $208 that last happened in September, as well as the one-time drop to the $197 low that we spotted during early October’s Prime Day event. Jumping on it now gives you a 30% markdown that cuts $90 off the going rate, landing it at the best price we have tracked in nearly five months – including beating out Black Friday pricing.

more…

Amazon is serving up some straight up cash discounts and over at Best Buy members can land $100 bonus rewards with purchase.
